jp.title: 「ゲームボーイアドバンス＆ゲームボーイ Nintendo Classics」向けに『トマトアドベンチャー』など5作品どどんと追加。人気作そろい踏み
jp.description: 任天堂は7月8日、「ゲームボーイアドバンス Nintendo Classics」および「ゲームボーイ Nintendo Classics」に向け、5作品を追加した。

jp.title: マウスコンピューターのノート＆デスクトップPCがAmazonプライムデーで安い！
jp.description: Amazon.co.jpでは、7月10日からAmazonプライム会員向けのビッグセール「Amazonプライムデー」の先行セールを実施中。マウスコンピューターストアページでは、Windows 11 Home搭載のノート＆デスクトップPCがプライム会員限定価格で販売されている。

jp.title: 「トマトアドベンチャー」など「ゲームボーイアドバンス Nintendo Classics」の追加タイトル情報が発表

jp.title: 『トマトアドベンチャー』『Dr. マリオ & パネルでポン』『ワリオランド』などがゲームボーイアドバンス＆ゲームボーイ Nintendo Classicsに追加
jp.description: 2026年7月8日にゲームボーイアドバンス＆ゲームボーイ Nintendo Classicsに5タイトルが追加。

jp.title: 絵本作家・林明子さん死去 81歳 肺炎のため 『はじめてのおつかい』イラスト、『こんとあき』など手掛ける
jp.description: ニュース｜　絵本作家の林明子さんが7月1日、長野県諏訪市の諏訪日赤病院にて、肺炎のため死去した。81歳だった。福音館書店が8日、文書と公式インスタグラムで伝えた。葬儀はすでに家族葬として執り行われ、お別れの会は未定。　同社は投稿で「『はじめてのおつかい』(筒井頼子さんとの共作)、『こんとあき』『おつきさまこんばんは』など、子どもたちへの愛情に満ちた温かな作品を、数多く残してくださいました」と振り返り、「謹んでお悔やみ申し上げます」とつづった。

jp.title: 佐藤二朗の怒りを増長させたフジテレビ、生々しい「決別宣言」で“ドル箱”『踊る』が負った致命傷（週刊女性PRIME）
jp.description: フジテレビが制作するドラマ『夫婦別姓刑事』での橋本愛に対するハラスメント報道を巡り、泥沼化の一途を辿る佐藤二朗。昨日、フジテレビ側がさらに詳細な説明を発表したことを受け、事態は誰もが予想しなかった

world.title: Family says woman died after hospital told her she faced a 25-hour wait
world.description: A grieving family is seeking answers about what their loved one was told about waiting times at Palmerston North Hospital before she walked out and died hours later while going to get help at another hospital.

world.title: WP announces appointments for its top leadership body, co-opts MPs Fadli Fawzi, Andre Low
world.description: Discover the latest appointments to the Workers' Party's top decision-making body and the co-option of two MPs. Read more at straitstimes.com.

world.title: Uganda Airlines Revenue Jumps to $116.2 Million
world.description: Uganda Airlines has recorded a sharp increase in revenue, rising from $10.3 million in the 2019/20 financial year to $116.2 million in 2024/25, according to the Ministry of Works and Transport. The ministry said the performance reflects a compound annual growth rate of 62.4 percent. The disclosure came on Tuesday after Works and Transport Minister …

world.title: Airtel to Trent: 44 cos likely to report double-digit profit slump in Q1. Are your stocks on the list?
world.description: Motilal Oswal expects 44 companies, including Bharti Airtel, Trent, IndiGo, HAL, GAIL and Cipla, to report double-digit year-on-year profit declines in the June quarter. Higher energy costs, weaker demand, geopolitical tensions and margin pressure are expected to weigh on earnings, even as overall corporate profit growth slows in Q1.

world.title: What to know about the total solar eclipse due in August
world.description: Here is what you need to know about the total eclipse, which is the first visible in mainland Europe since 2006.

world.title: Australia launches $250 million diplomacy bid to boost NRL in the Pacific
world.description: Australia will pour millions more into boosting the Pacific involvement in the NRL through youth competitions and matches held overseas as it battles China for influence in the region.

world.title: Charlie Kirk shooting DNA ties Tyler Robinson to alleged murder weapon
world.description: Tyler Robinson's DNA and that of former lover Lance Twiggs were allegedly found on a towel and screwdriver recovered in the Charlie Kirk shooting investigation at Utah Valley University

world.title: How the amino acid leucine helps our cells produce energy
world.description: Discover how the amino acid leucine enhances energy production and protects mitochondrial health in our cells.

world.title: 99% of people on Earth will get sunlight at the same time this Wednesday
world.description: On July 8, at about 11:10 GMT, about 99 percent of the world experiences sunlight at the same time.

world.title: Girls' Generation member Yuri currently in Singapore, received new Beary plushie on Singapore Airlines flight
world.description: Girls' Generation member Yuri is currently in Singapore and received a new Beary plushie on her Singapore Airlines flight.
